measurement_note: Size is n, the digit-string length. The legal 20/80/320 repeated-decimal-cycle tiers span 16x and give every digit an even count, so the full string is the answer while every endpoint remains relevant. The remotely Accepted ten-bit prefix-mask scan is O(n), and an independent earliest-mask map must also pass. A correct incremental parity scan over every substring completes every tier and must be rejected only by its O(n^2) scaling.
